Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe it's something in the ingredients,[n]but I feel a little smarter...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder what's in this food... I feel[n]like my mind is clearer than usual...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel smarter now that[n]I've had some brain food...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the omega-3s in the fish, I feel[n]like my mind is sharper than before...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense omega-3s rushing to my brain.[n]I feel like I can solve any problem now...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Every bite fills my mouth with flavor[n]and my brain with omega-3s...![n]{f 1 1}
